ddls:
CREATE TABLE "chemicals" (
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical */,
  "chemical_name" TEXT /* Name of the chemical */,
  "chemical_type" TEXT /* Type of the chemical (e.g., herbicide, pesticide) */,
  "active_ingredient" TEXT /* Active ingredient in the chemical */,
  "cas_number" TEXT /* CAS number of the chemical */,
  "epa_registration_number" TEXT /* EPA registration number of the chemical */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the chemical */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "survey_year" INTEGER /* Year the survey was conducted */,
  "survey_type" TEXT /* Type of survey (e.g., national, regional) */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect data (e.g., online, mail) */,
  "geographic_scope" TEXT /* Geographic scope of the survey (e.g., national, regional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_results" (
  "survey_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey result */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the result belongs to */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical used */,
  "sort_order" INTEGER /* Sort order of the chemical in the survey */,
  "percent_acres_treated" REAL /* Percentage of acres treated with the chemical */,
  "one_time_application_rate" REAL /* One-time application rate of the chemical */,
  "number_of_applications" REAL /* Number of applications of the chemical */,
  "rate_per_crop_year" REAL /* Application rate of the chemical per crop year */,
  "surveyed_acre_treatments" INTEGER /* Number of surveyed acre treatments */,
  "surveyed_acres" INTEGER /* Number of surveyed acres */,
  "total_acres" INTEGER /* Total acres treated */,
  "application_timing" TEXT /* Timing of application (e.g., pre-plant, post-emergence) */,
  "crop_type" TEXT /* Type of crop treated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_results_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_results_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chemical_usage" (
  "chemical_usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical usage record */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical used */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the usage data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the chemical was used */,
  "total_acres_treated" INTEGER /* Total acres treated with the chemical in that year */,
  "total_amount_applied" REAL /* Total amount of chemical applied in that year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chemical_usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chemical_usage_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chemical_usage_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_rates" (
  "application_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application rate record */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical the rate belongs to */,
  "application_rate" REAL /* Application rate of the chemical */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the application rate (e.g., kg/ha, lbs/acre) */,
  "application_method" TEXT /* Method of application (e.g., aerial, ground) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_rates_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treated_acres" (
  "treated_acre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treated acre record */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical used */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the treated acre data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the acres were treated */,
  "total_acres_treated" INTEGER /* Total acres treated with the chemical in that year */,
  "average_acre_treatment_cost" REAL /* Average cost of treating an acre with the chemical */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treated_acre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treated_acres_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treated_acres_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_downloaded" INTEGER /* Whether data was downloaded or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the role belongs to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the role will expire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_years" (
  "survey_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey year record */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the year belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the survey was conducted */,
  "data_collection_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of data collection */,
  "data_collection_end_date" TEXT /* End date of data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_years_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chemical_years" (
  "chemical_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical year record */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical the year belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the chemical was used */,
  "total_usage" REAL /* Total usage of the chemical in that year */,
  "average_usage_rate" REAL /* Average usage rate of the chemical in that year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chemical_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chemical_years_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government, academic) */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "data_import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source the import belongs to */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the import belongs to */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date the data was imported */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the import (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)
